n船舶ナイト号.director: マルグリット・デュラス

nガンジスの女.director: マルグリット・デュラス

t356097.tmdb_overview_en: Two Hong Kong men must find a way to deal with their love lives: One with a much younger girlfriend and is admired by his co-worker, and one who is married to two hilarious, dictatorial and stubborn women.

t1188968.movie_title: どうすればよかったか？
t1188968.movie_title_jp: どうすればよかったか？
t1188968.clean_title_jp: どうすればよかったか？
t1188968.movie_title_original: どうすればよかったか？
t1188968.synopsis: ドキュメンタリー監督の藤野知明が、統合失調症の症状が現れた姉と、彼女を精神科の受診から遠ざけた両親の姿を20年にわたって自ら記録したドキュメンタリー。 面倒見がよく優秀な8歳上の姉。両親の影響から医師を目指して医学部に進学した彼女が、ある日突然、事実とは思えないことを叫びだした。統合失調症が疑われたが、医師で研究者でもある父と母は病気だと認めず、精神科の受診から彼女を遠ざける。その判断に疑問を感じた藤野監督は両親を説得するものの解決には至らず、わだかまりを抱えたまま実家を離れる。 姉の発症から18年後、映像制作を学んだ藤野監督は帰省するたびに家族の様子を記録するように。一家全員での外出や食卓の風景にカメラを向けながら両親と対話を重ね、姉に声をかけ続けるが、状況はさらに悪化。ついに両親は玄関に鎖と南京錠をかけて姉を閉じ込めるようになってしまう。
t1188968.synopsis_en: Documentary filmmaker Tomoaki Fujino records over 20 years the story of his older sister, who began showing symptoms of schizophrenia, and his parents, who kept her from seeing a psychiatrist. His sister, eight years older, was caring and excellent. Influenced by their parents, she entered medical school to become a doctor. One day, she suddenly started screaming things that weren't true. Schizophrenia was suspected, but her parents—a doctor and a researcher—refused to acknowledge the illness and kept her away from psychiatric care. Doubting their judgment, Fujino tried to persuade them but failed, and left home with a lingering sense of unease. Eighteen years after his sister's onset, Fujino, having studied filmmaking, began recording his family's life whenever he visited home. He filmed family outings and dinner scenes, engaged his parents in conversation, and kept talking to his sister, but her condition worsened. Eventually, his parents installed a chain and padlock on the front door to confine her inside.
t1188968.tmdb_overview_en: In 1983, the director’s 24-year-old sister developed symptoms of schizophrenia. Her parents couldn’t accept it—refusing to seek treatment for their sick child, they confined her to their house, to the point of even fixing a padlock on the front door to lock her in. Her younger brother, suspicious of his parents’ actions, began filming the family in an effort to openly question them. A family conflict that lasted over twenty years.

n映画 記憶の解凍【英語字幕】 G.movie_title: 映画 記憶の解凍【英語字幕】 G
n映画 記憶の解凍【英語字幕】 G.movie_title_jp: 映画 記憶の解凍【英語字幕】 G

n記憶の解凍.synopsis: 広島県出身の庭田杏珠監督が、高校時代から9年間続けてきた「記憶の解凍」の取り組みを、ドキュメンタリーとアニメーションで表現した作品。 原爆投下前後の日常をとらえたモノクロ写真を、戦争体験者との対話やAI技術などを組み合わせてカラー化することで“記憶の色”を再現する「記憶の解凍」。カラー化した写真をもとに行う対話により、凍りついていた悲しい記憶が、戦前の幸せな日常の記憶へと変化していく。広島平和記念公園がある地域にかつて存在した繁華街・中島本町の元住民たちなど、国内外の30人以上と対話した記録の中から、貴重な“語り”を伝えていく。アニメーションパートでは、失われた日常の色を取り戻すべくタイムマシーンで時空を超えて旅をする主人公アンジーの姿を描き出す。 アニメーションパートは庭田監督がイラストを描き、アニメーション映画「この世界の片隅に」の片渕須直監督による監修のもと、映像作家・野村健太らが制作に参加。作曲家・ピアニストのはらかなこが音楽を手がけ、広島平和記念資料館や平和記念公園を巡り、被爆者と対話して、主題歌「平和色の写真」を作曲。庭田監督が歌詞を書き、被爆体験を伝承する活動に取り組むシンガーソングライターのHIPPYが歌唱を担当。
n記憶の解凍.synopsis_en: A film by director Anju Niwata from Hiroshima Prefecture, expressing her nine-year project "Memory Thawing" through documentary and animation. "Memory Thawing" recreates the "colors of memory" by colorizing black-and-white photos capturing daily life before and after the atomic bombing, combining dialogue with war survivors and AI technology. Through conversations based on the colorized photos, frozen sad memories transform into memories of happy pre-war daily life. The film conveys precious "narratives" from records of dialogues with over 30 people in Japan and abroad, including former residents of Nakajima-honmachi, a once-thriving entertainment district in the area now home to the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park. The animation part depicts the protagonist Anji, who travels through time in a time machine to restore the colors of a lost everyday life. Director Niwata drew the illustrations for the animation part, which was produced under the supervision of Sunao Katabuchi, director of the animated film "In This Corner of the World," with participation from video artist Kenta Nomura and others. Composer and pianist Kanako Hara handled the music, composing the theme song "Heiwa Iro no Shashin" after visiting the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Museum and Peace Memorial Park and speaking with atomic bomb survivors. Director Niwata wrote the lyrics, and HIPPY, a singer-songwriter active in passing down the atomic bomb experience, performed the song.

t1535944.synopsis: すれ違う夫婦の現在と、かつての記憶を揺さぶる友人との再会を、過去と現在を交錯させながら描いたラブストーリー。「春みたいだ」「窓たち」などの短編作品で注目を集めた志萱大輔が長編初監督を務め、7年の制作期間を経て完成させた。 音楽家のモリは、写真家である妻マイコとの距離を埋められず悩んでいた。そんなある日、モリはかつての友人アサコと思いがけない再会を果たし、彼女への古い愛情を呼び起こされる。アサコもまた、かつて自分がモリにひかれていたことを思い出す。しかし、ふたりの記憶は期待や欲望を含みながら、ぼやけ、歪み、それぞれの中で都合よく書き換えられて現れる。そして長い散歩のあとで、モリとアサコは既に軌道を外れてしまったふたつの人生と、それぞれが立つ現在を改めて見つめ直していく。 シンガーソングライター「soma」としても活動する俳優の藤井草馬がモリ役で主演を務め、音楽も担当。「息を殺して」の谷口蘭がモリの妻マイコ、「オーガスト・マイ・ヘヴン」の村上由規乃がモリのかつての友人アサコを演じた。2025年・第30回釜山国際映画祭コンペティション部門出品作品。
t1535944.synopsis_en: A love story that interweaves past and present, depicting the current state of a drifting married couple and a reunion with a friend that stirs up past memories. This is the feature-length directorial debut of Daisuke Shigayuki, who gained attention for short films like "Haru Mitai da" and "Madotachi," completed after a seven-year production period. Mori, a musician, is troubled by the distance he feels from his wife Maiko, a photographer. One day, Mori unexpectedly reunites with a former friend, Asako, rekindling old feelings for her. Asako also remembers being attracted to Mori in the past. However, their memories, tinged with expectations and desires, appear blurry, distorted, and conveniently rewritten in each of their minds. After a long walk, Mori and Asako reexamine their two lives that have already gone off track and the present moment they each stand in. Actor Soma Fujii, who also works as singer-songwriter "soma," stars as Mori and also handles the music. Ran Taniguchi (from "Hold Your Breath") plays Mori's wife Maiko, and Yukiho Murakami (from "August My Heaven") plays Mori's former friend Asako. The film was selected for the competition section of the 30th Busan International Film Festival in 2025.
t1535944.tmdb_overview_en: Plagued by insomnia and lethargy, Mori lets time drift aimlessly, unable to create any meaningful music, all while uneasily sharing a home with his wife, Maiko, a successful and driven photographer. When Mori and his former lover, Asako, reunite by chance and catch up, they confront different versions of the past within their own recalled memories. After they part ways, Asako comes home to a warm meal lovingly prepared by her partner, and a rekindled desire to paint again. At the same time, Mori visits Maiko’s exhibition, and discovers scenes of his own daily life, captured within her affectionate frames.

t1379266.synopsis: 任侠の家に生まれながらも、歌舞伎役者として芸の道に人生を捧げた男の激動の人生を描いた人間ドラマ。日本映画界を席巻した話題作、ついに上映！
t1379266.synopsis_en: A human drama depicting the tumultuous life of a man born into a yakuza family who dedicates his life to the path of art as a Kabuki actor. A talked-about sensation that has taken the Japanese film world by storm, finally screening!
t1379266.tmdb_overview_en: Nagasaki, 1964: Following the death of his yakuza father, 15-year-old Kikuo is taken under the wing of a famous kabuki actor. Alongside Shunsuke, the actor’s only son, he decides to dedicate himself to this traditional form of theatre. For decades, the two young men grow and evolve together – and one will become the greatest Japanese master of the art of kabuki.
t1379266.tmdb_overview_jp: 後に国の宝となる男は、任侠の一門に生まれた。抗争で父を亡くした喜久雄（吉沢亮）は、上方歌舞伎の名門の当主・花井半二郎（渡辺謙）に引き取られ、歌舞伎の世界へ飛び込む。そこで、半二郎の実の息子として、生まれながらに将来を約束された御曹司・俊介（横浜流星）と出会う。正反対の血筋を受け継ぎ、生い立ちも才能も異なる2人は、ライバルとして互いに高め合い、芸に青春を捧げるが、多くの出会いと別れが運命の歯車を狂わせていく……。

t1598671.synopsis: 難病の母を支えるため夢を諦めかけていた高3の佑。進学という希望を打ち明けられず葛藤する彼は…。親子の絆と自立を描く感涙のヒューマンドラマ。
t1598671.synopsis_en: Yū, a high school senior, is on the verge of giving up his dreams to support his mother, who suffers from a serious illness. Torn by his inability to confess his hope of pursuing higher education... A heart-wrenching human drama about the bonds between parent and child and the journey toward independence.
t1598671.tmdb_overview_en: Tasuku is a high school senior taking care of his single mother Misaki, who has ALS. Though they have a helper who visits during the day, Tasuku still has to take care of cooking and housework, as well as helping his mother use the toilet. Because of this, he's had to quit the basketball team. Tasuku hasn't been focusing on his future plans, since he feels like it wouldn't matter in the first place. But when his mother gets approved for more caregivers, he suddenly has the chance to pursue his dream college. But can he really leave his increasingly infirm mother behind?

t1140498.director: ブラッドレイ・クーパー
t1140498.synopsis: 順調な人生が一転し、結婚生活が破綻した夫婦。失意の夫・アレックスは、コメディクラブで夫婦関係を笑いに変え、新たな生きがいを見出していく。
t1140498.synopsis_en: A couple whose smooth-sailing life takes a turn and their marriage falls apart. The disheartened husband, Alex, finds a new purpose in life by turning their marital woes into comedy at a comedy club.
t1140498.tmdb_overview_en: As their marriage quietly unravels, Alex faces middle age and an impending divorce, seeking new purpose in the New York comedy scene while Tess confronts the sacrifices she made for their family—forcing them to navigate co-parenting, identity, and whether love can take a new form.
t1140498.tmdb_overview_jp: 二人の子供にも恵まれ、順調なはずだった夫婦、アレックスとテス。中年にさしかかり、置き去りにしてきたそれぞれの夢が二人の結婚生活を終わりに向かわせる。失意の中、ニューヨークの街でふと足を運んだコメディクラブで偶然舞台に立つアレックス。夫婦の赤裸々な関係を“笑い”に変えながら、新しい生きがいを見つけていくアレックス。その先にあった思いがけない人生とは…。

t1221061.director: マーシャ・シリンスキ』
t1221061.synopsis: 1910年代から現代まで異なる時代の4人の少女が、北ドイツの農場で体験する不可解な出来事。彼女達の〈不安〉が響き合う、百年にわたる映像叙事詩。
t1221061.synopsis_en: Four girls from different eras, spanning from the 1910s to the present day, experience inexplicable events on a farm in northern Germany. A century-spanning visual epic where their anxieties resonate with one another.
t1221061.tmdb_overview_en: Four adolescent girls each spend their youth in the same farmhouse over the last century. Though separated by decades, resonances between their lives emerge: their desires and distress, secrets and truths, encounters with another’s gaze and defiant gaze in return.

nライフテープ.director: 安楽涼 プロデューサー：大島新、前田亜紀
nライフテープ.synopsis: ダンサーの隆一と妻・朱香、約12万人に1人の難病「メンケス病」を抱える息子・珀久の3人と猫が織りなす愛おしい日々を軽やかに映すドキュメンタリー。
nライフテープ.synopsis_en:
This is the first documentary from director and actor Ryo Anraku, who has previously crafted feature films based on his own experiences, such as *Halfway Through a Dream* and *Dance of One*. The film tenderly captures the precious daily lives of Anraku’s close friend, street dancer and artist Ryuichi, his wife Ayaka, their son Haku—who lives with Menkes disease, a rare condition said to affect only one in 120,000 people—and their cat, Figaro.

In October 2022, after being asked by his childhood friend Ryuichi to "film my family," Anraku began documenting their lives. Their newborn son, Haku, has Menkes disease, a congenital metabolic disorder caused by a copper deficiency that leads to various health complications. While the life shared by the family and Figaro is filled with smiles, Ayaka’s diary—written between Haku's birth and his diagnosis—contains the raw, poignant words of a couple struggling to accept their reality. As they continue to weave their daily lives while confronting inescapable loneliness and anxiety, they reach a major turning point: the decision for Haku to undergo a tracheostomy. This theatrical version has been re-edited from the edition screened at the 16th Za-Koenji Documentary Festival in 2025.

t31767.tmdb_overview_en: A charismatic 17th-century French priest becomes the target of a sexually obsessed nun’s witchcraft accusations, which corrupt church and state officials are all too happy to exploit.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

t593.director: アンドレイ・タルコフスキー
genres: サイエンスフィクション
t593.synopsis: ソ連出身の名匠アンドレイ・タルコフスキーが、ポーランドの作家スタニスワフ・レムの代表作「ソラリスの陽のもとに」を映画化したSF。未知の生命体と接触し、極限状態に置かれた人間の心理を独特の映像表現で描き、1972年・第25回カンヌ国際映画祭で審査員特別賞を受賞した。 海と雲に覆われ、生物の存在が確認されていない惑星ソラリス。科学者たちはその海に理性があると考え、接触を図るが失敗に終わる。宇宙ステーションは謎の混乱に陥り、地球との通信も途絶えてしまう。心理学者クリスが原因究明のため送り込まれるが、友人の物理学者はすでに自殺しており、残る2人の科学者も怯えきっていた。やがてクリスの前に、数年前に自殺した妻が姿を現す。
t593.synopsis_en: When communication is lost with the space station Prometheus, which is exploring the ocean-and-cloud-covered planet Solaris, psychologist Kris is sent to investigate. Upon arriving at the Prometheus, Kris witnesses the suicide of a friend, traces of people who shouldn't be there, and a series of inexplicable phenomena caused by the sentient organic ocean.
t593.tmdb_overview_en: A psychologist is sent to a space station orbiting a planet called Solaris to investigate the death of a doctor and the mental problems of cosmonauts on the station. He soon discovers that the water on the planet is a type of brain which brings out repressed memories and obsessions.
t593.tmdb_overview_jp: 海と雲に覆われた惑星ソラリスを探索中の宇宙ステーション「プロメテウス」との通信が途切れたことから、心理学者のクリスは調査のために派遣される。  「プロメテウス」に到着したクリスが目にしたのは、友人の自殺死体、いないはずの人物の痕跡、そして知性を持つ有機体である海が及ぼす、不可解な現象の数々であった。

t24128.movie_title: ストップ・メイキング・センス
t24128.movie_title_jp: ストップ・メイキング・センス
t24128.clean_title_jp: ストップ・メイキング・センス
t24128.synopsis: 1980年代の音楽シーンに変革をもたらしたアメリカのロックバンド「トーキング・ヘッズ」が1983年に行った伝説のライブを記録したドキュメンタリー。 キャリア絶頂期にいた彼らが全米ツアー中の83年12月にハリウッドのパンテージ・シアターで敢行したライブの模様を収録。バンドのフロントマンであるデビッド・バーンの躍動感あふれるパフォーマンスに、彼を象徴する衣装「ビッグ・スーツ」、エキセントリックなダンスとエキサイティングな演出による圧巻のステージを映し出す。 後に「羊たちの沈黙」でアカデミー賞を受賞するジョナサン・デミが監督を務め、「ブレードランナー」のジョーダン・クローネンウェスが撮影を担当。2023年には、1992年から眠っていた本作のネガを基に、バンドメンバーのジェリー・ハリスン自らサウンド監修を手がけた4Kレストア版としてリマスターされた。
t24128.synopsis_en: A live documentary of the rock band Talking Heads. Capturing their 1983 stage performance at the Pantages Theatre with various camera angles, it conveys the raw energy and excitement directly.
t24128.tmdb_overview_en: A concert film documenting Talking Heads at the height of their popularity, on tour for their 1983 album "Speaking in Tongues." The band takes the stage one by one and is joined by a cadre of guest musicians for a career-spanning and cinematic performance that features creative choreography and visuals.
t24128.tmdb_overview_jp: ロックバンド、トーキング・ヘッズのライブドキュメンタリー。1983年にバンデージ・シアターで行ったステージを様々なカメラワークで捉え、生の熱気をストレートに伝える。

t499.synopsis: ヌーベルバーグを代表する女性監督アニエス・バルダ初期の傑作で、ガンの診断結果を待つ若い女性歌手クレオの5時から7時までをリアルタイムで切り取った作品。ポップ歌手のクレオは自分がガンではないかと疑い、病院で精密検査を受ける。その結果が判明する7時までの間、クレオはパリの街中をさまよいながら幾人かの友人や見知らぬ人々と出会い、心の平静を取り戻していく。本作の音楽も手掛けた名作曲家ミシェル・ルグランがクレオの友人である音楽家ボブを演じたほか、ジャン＝リュック・ゴダール、アンナ・カリーナもカメオ出演している。
t499.synopsis_en: Cleo (Corinne Marchand) is a beautiful blonde woman. Lately, however, Cleo is troubled. She feels unwell. The thought that it might be cancer makes her restless. Recently, she underwent a thorough examination at the hospital. The results are due this evening. Cleo is terrified of that moment. Five o'clock. Cleo sits down before a female fortune teller. The fortune teller sees through her illness.
t499.tmdb_overview_en: Agnès Varda eloquently captures Paris in the sixties with this real-time portrait of a singer set adrift in the city as she awaits test results of a biopsy. A chronicle of the minutes of one woman’s life, Cléo from 5 to 7 is a spirited mix of vivid vérité and melodrama, featuring a score by Michel Legrand and cameos by Jean-Luc Godard and Anna Karina.
t499.tmdb_overview_jp: クレオ（コリンヌ・マルシャン）はブロンド髪の美しい娘。が、最近クレオは悩んでいる。体の具合が悪いのだ。もしガンだったら……と思うと、いてもたってもいられない。先日、彼女は病院で精密検査を受けた。結果の出るのは今日の夕刻。クレオはその時刻の来るのがこわかった。五時。クレオは女占師の前に腰をおろす。占師は彼女が病気であることを見透した。

t44018.synopsis: フランスを代表する映画作家アニエス・バルダが、さすらいの末に凍死した少女が死に至るまでの足取りを描き、1985年・第42回ベネチア国際映画祭で最高賞にあたる金獅子賞に輝いた作品。 冬の南フランス。片田舎の畑の側溝で、18歳の少女モナが凍死体となって発見された。ヒッチハイクをしながらあてのない孤独な旅を続けていたモナが命を落とすまでの数週間の道程を、彼女が路上で出会った人たちの証言を通してたどっていく。 「仕立て屋の恋」のサンドリーヌ・ボネールが主演を務め、「昼顔」のマーシャ・メリル、「ふたりの5つの分かれ路」のステファーヌ・フレス、「セラフィーヌの庭」のヨランド・モローが共演。フランスでは当時100万人を超える動員を記録し、バルダ監督最大のヒット作となった。
t44018.synopsis_en: A film by renowned French filmmaker Agnès Varda, tracing the steps of a young girl who freezes to death after wandering, which won the Golden Lion, the top prize, at the 42nd Venice International Film Festival in 1985. In winter in southern France, the body of an 18-year-old girl, Mona, is found frozen to death in a roadside ditch in the countryside. The film traces Mona's journey over the final weeks of her life as she hitchhikes aimlessly and continues a solitary journey, through the testimonies of the people she met on the road. Starring Sandrine Bonnaire (from "The Hairdresser's Husband"), with co-stars Macha Méril (from "Belle de Jour"), Stéphane Freiss (from "The Five Senses"), and Yolande Moreau (from "Séraphine"). It recorded over one million admissions in France at the time, becoming Varda's biggest hit.
t44018.tmdb_overview_en: Mona Bergeron is dead, her frozen body found in a ditch in the French countryside. From this, the film flashes back to the weeks leading up to her death. Through these flashbacks, Mona gradually declines as she travels from place to place, taking odd jobs and staying with whomever will offer her a place to sleep. Mona is fiercely independent, craving freedom over comfort, but it is this desire to be free that will eventually lead to her demise.

t1651166.synopsis: 小説家・京極夏彦が現代を舞台に描いた異色の同名ミステリー小説を、主演に奈緒を迎えて実写映画化。 鹿島亜佐美という女性が何者かに殺害された。犯人の正体も犯行動機もわからないなか、生前の亜佐美と付き合いがあった人々のもとに、彼女のことについて聞きたいという謎めいた女性・渡来映子が訪ねてくる。さまざまな証言をたどるうちに、亜佐美という人物の輪郭と、彼女と映子との関係が浮かび上がっていく。 亜佐美について尋ね歩く映子を奈緒が演じ、尋ねる相手によって印象の異なる亜佐美役で伊東蒼、亜佐美と不倫関係にあった上司・山崎寛之役で前原滉、亜佐美の先輩・篠宮佳織役で髙橋ひかる、亜佐美の恋人・佐久間雄也役で草川拓弥（超特急）、亜佐美の母・鹿島尚子役で田畑智子、亜佐美の事件に関わる弁護士・五條陸役で平原テツが共演。「マイ・ダディ」でも奈緒と組んだ金井純一監督がメガホンをとり、「桐島、部活やめるってよ」の喜安浩平が脚本を手がけた。ロックバンド「This is LAST」が主題歌を担当。
t1651166.synopsis_en: A live-action film adaptation of novelist Kyogoku Natsuhiko's unique mystery novel of the same name set in modern times, starring Nao. A woman named Asami Kashima is murdered. With no clue as to the culprit's identity or motive, a mysterious woman named Eiko Watarai visits those who knew Asami in life, claiming she wants to ask about her. As she follows various testimonies, the outline of Asami's character and her relationship with Eiko gradually emerge. Nao plays Eiko, who goes around asking about Asami. Aoi Ito plays Asami, whose impression changes depending on who is asked; Ko Maehara plays Asami's boss and lover, Hiroyuki Yamazaki; Hikaru Takahashi plays Asami's senior, Kaori Shinomiya; Takuya Kusakawa (from the group Shinkansen) plays Asami's boyfriend, Yuya Sakuma; Tomoko Tabata plays Asami's mother, Naoko Kashima; and Tetsu Hirahara plays the lawyer involved in Asami's case, Riku Gojo. Directed by Junichi Kanai, who previously worked with Nao on "My Daddy," with a screenplay by Kohei Kiyasu (known for "The Kirishima Thing"). The rock band "This is LAST" performs the theme song.
t1651166.tmdb_overview_en: Asami Kashima was killed by someone. Eiko Watarai visits Asami's boss, Yamazaki, asking him to tell about her…

t11328.movie_title: プッシャー2【4Kデジタル修復版】
t11328.director: ニコラス・ウィンディング・レフン
t11328.tmdb_overview_en: Tonny is released from prison - again. This time he has his mind set on changing his broken down life, but that is easier said than done.

t2061.movie_title: プッシャー【4Kデジタル修復版】
t2061.director: ニコラス・ウィンディング・レフン
t2061.synopsis_en: Frank, a highly skilled drug pusher, makes money with his partner Tony by carrying out jobs for drug kingpin Milo. After taking a huge loan from Milo for a large deal, a police raid causes the deal to fail, and Frank loses the money, facing relentless pressure from his boss to repay the debt. A crime action drama that depicts a man spiraling into a hellish debt trap in the underworld of rampant drug trafficking, pushed to his absolute limits, all rendered in dark, stylish visuals. This is Nicolas Winding Refn's landmark debut film, hailed as the Danish film that first achieved worldwide success as a gangster movie.
t2061.tmdb_overview_en: A drug pusher grows increasingly desperate after a botched deal leaves him with a large debt to a ruthless drug lord.
t2061.tmdb_overview_jp: 凄腕の麻薬密売人（＝プッシャー）であるフランクは、相棒のトニーとともに麻薬王のボス、ミロからの仕事をこなしては金儲けをしていた。ある時、大口取引のため、ミロに多額の借金をしたフランクだったが、警察の手入れが入り失敗、金も失いボスからは借金返済を執拗に迫られる。麻薬の密売が横行する裏社会で怒涛の借金地獄に陥り、極限状態に追い詰められていく男の姿をとことんダークでスタイリッシュな映像で描くクライム・アクション・ドラマ。デンマーク映画が初めてワールドワイドで成功をおさめたギャング映画と高い評価を得た、ニコラス・ウィンディング・レフン監督の記念すべきデビュー作。

t11330.movie_title: プッシャー3【4Kデジタル修復版】
t11330.director: ニコラス・ウィンディング・レフン
t11330.tmdb_overview_en: Milo is aging, he is planning his daughter's 25th birthday, and his shipment of heroin turns out to be 10,000 pills of ecstasy. When Milo tries to sell the pills anyway, all Hell breaks loose and his only chance is to ask for help from his ex-henchman and old friend Radovan.

t504234.program_title: 映画監督・加藤泰 生誕110年記念 山中貞雄と加藤泰
t504234.synopsis: かいせつ 明治後期の洲崎遊廓に貧農の娘が娼妓として売られ…。骨の髄まで搾取される女たちの悲哀と逞しさを描く、加藤泰流の激烈な傑作女性映画。
t504234.synopsis_en: In the late Meiji period, a poor farmer's daughter is sold as a prostitute to the Suzaki pleasure quarters. A fierce masterpiece of women's cinema by Tai Kato, depicting the sorrow and resilience of women exploited to the bone.
t504234.tmdb_overview_en: The harrowing journey of Kinu Wada, a young woman who is sold into prostitution to pay her family's debts.

t303629.program_title: 映画監督・加藤泰 生誕110年記念 山中貞雄と加藤泰
t303629.synopsis: かいせつ 一人の女を愛し続ける博徒・仙吉の激動の半生。幕末の京都を舞台に男と女の虚飾のない愛を力強く描き、集大成となった加藤泰渾身の最後の劇映画。
t303629.synopsis_en: The turbulent life of gambler Senkichi, who continues to love one woman. Set in Kyoto at the end of the Edo period, this powerful portrayal of unadorned love between a man and a woman stands as Tai Kato's final, crowning live-action film.
t303629.tmdb_overview_en: ​The story follows the chance meeting between Senkichi, a wandering gambler on the run, and Orin, a blind musician who offers him kindness and shelter. As their lives become intertwined, they attempt to find a sense of peace and domesticity while caught in the crossfire of the violent Bakumatsu revolution.

t128722.program_title: 映画監督・加藤泰 生誕110年記念 山中貞雄と加藤泰
t128722.synopsis: かいせつ 甘酒屋の娘(原)の窮地を救うため、二人のならず者が身を投げ出す——。前進座の名優達と山中の相性も抜群の傑作。15歳の原節子の美しさが目を奪う。
t128722.synopsis_en: To save the daughter of an amazake shop owner from a dire situation, two rogues throw themselves into the fray. A masterpiece showcasing perfect chemistry between the renowned actors of Zenshinza and director Yamanaka. The beauty of a 15-year-old Setsuko Hara is captivating.
t128722.tmdb_overview_en: A boy steals a knife from an old samurai, unaware of its value, setting off a strange chain of events.
t128722.tmdb_overview_jp: 居酒屋に居候する河内山宗俊と、用心棒の金子市之丞。その日暮らしの生活を送る彼らにとって、甘酒屋の娘・お浪は心の慰めだった。ある日、お浪が不良の弟・広太郎の借金のために身売りすることを知った宗俊と市之丞は、彼女を救うべく手を組むが...。

t238937.movie_title_original: 沓掛時次郎　遊侠一匹
t238937.program_title: 映画監督・加藤泰 生誕110年記念 山中貞雄と加藤泰
t238937.synopsis: かいせつ 時次郎は渡世の義理で斬った男の妻子と旅へ…。名作戯曲の8度目の映画化に挑んだ加藤泰が、切ない愛の物語に至高の抒情を結晶させた傑作。
t238937.synopsis_en: Tokijiro sets out on a journey with the wife and child of a man he killed out of obligation to the underworld. This eighth film adaptation of a classic play, directed by Tai Kato, crystallizes supreme lyricism into a poignant love story, resulting in a masterpiece.
t238937.tmdb_overview_en: Tokijiro has the unfortunate duty according to the code of the gamblers to join in the fighting when afforded a night’s stay and meals at the home of a town boss. Though he dislikes killing, the strength of his swordsmanship will be tested time and time again in the bloody tale.

t63647.tmdb_overview_en: Muthu Pandi, a village strongman, decides to marry Dhanalakshmi, and begins his quest by eliminating everyone who opposes their union - starting with both her brothers. In desperation, Dhanalakshmi decides to escape from the village, and in the process is unwittingly assisted by a university Kabaddi player Velu.

t331322.synopsis_en: An entertainment film based on Arima Yorichika's original work "Kisaburo Ichidai," adapted by Kikushima Ryuzo and directed by Masumura Yasuzo. Its success led to a series of nine films. The dynamic duo of the outrageous protagonist played by Katsu Shintaro and the intellectual officer played by Tamura Takahiro are the highlight.
t331322.tmdb_overview_en: A young intellectual conscientious objector is forced to serve with the Japanese army in Manchuria. He joins with a dim-witted former gangster in an effort to desert by stealing a train.
t331322.tmdb_overview_jp: 有馬頼義の原作『貴三郎一代』を、菊島隆三が脚色し増村保造が監督した娯楽映画。本作のヒットによりシリーズ化され、全部で9作が製作された。勝新太郎演じる破天荒な主人公と、田村高廣演じるインテリ上官のコンビが大活躍する。

t20525.synopsis: 元禄15年。父親の仇討ちという宿命を背負って信州から江戸に赴き、貧乏長屋に身を潜めた若侍（岡田）。長屋の人々と触れ合ううち、彼の決心が揺らいでいくさまを描く。物語の背景に赤穂浪士の討ち入りを盛り込みつつ、逆手にとって、「弱いものが弱いまま肯定される物語を目指した」（是枝）。これまでフィクションとノンフィクションの距離を意識して劇映画を撮ってきた是枝が、初めてどっぷりと物語世界に挑んだ意欲作。
t20525.synopsis_en: In the 15th year of the Genroku era. A young samurai (Okada) burdened by the duty to avenge his father travels from Shinshu to Edo and hides out in a tenement slum. The film depicts how his resolve begins to waver as he interacts with the residents of the tenement. While weaving the story of the Ako Ronin's raid into the background, director Kore-eda turns it on its head, aiming for 'a story where the weak are affirmed as they are.' This ambitious work marks Kore-eda's first deep dive into a narrative world, having previously been conscious of the distance between fiction and nonfiction in his live-action films.
t20525.tmdb_overview_en: In a poor district of Edo lives a young samurai named Soza. He has been sent by his clan to avenge the death of his father. He isn't an accomplished swordsman however, and he prefers sharing the life of the residents, teaching the kids how to write etc. When he finally finds the man he is looking for, he will have to decide whether he follows the way of the samurai or chooses peace and reconciliation.
t20525.tmdb_overview_jp: 徳川5代将軍・綱吉の泰平の御代、赤穂浪士たちが吉良上野介を仇討ちするかどうかに関心が集まっていた元禄15年。父親の仇討ちのため、郷里を後にした若侍、青木宗左衛門の江戸暮らしも半年を過ぎ、庶民の町での生活もすっかり板についていた。いつしか自宅の向かいに住む夫を亡くした女性、おさえに恋心を抱くようになった彼だが、実は武士とは名ばかり。剣の腕前がからっきしだめなことが長屋の面々にも知れ渡ってしまう。

t25050.movie_title: 歩いても 歩いても
t25050.movie_title_jp: 歩いても 歩いても
t25050.clean_title_jp: 歩いても 歩いても
t25050.movie_title_original: 歩いても 歩いても
t25050.synopsis: 今年もまた兄の命日に家族を伴って帰省した良多（阿部）。だが亡き兄に代わって家業の医者を継がなかった良多は年老いた父（原田）との折り合いも悪く、実は気の進まぬ帰省だった。そんな良多に一定の理解を示す母（樹木）にも異変の兆候が…。是枝が自身の母親の死を受け止め、前に進むために撮らなければならなかったと語る作品。従来は社会的テーマを確信的に織り込んできた是枝だが、本作で個人の生活の切実さを描くことが必然的に社会性に繋がることを確信し、作風が変わったとも語っている。
t25050.synopsis_en: Director Hirokazu Kore-eda of "Nobody Knows" and "Maborosi" quietly captures the scene of a family gathering at their elderly parents' home for the first time in a while, bringing out the joys and sorrows of life in this home drama. One summer day, the second son, Ryota, and the eldest daughter, Chinami, bring their respective families to the home where former doctor Kyohei Yokoyama and his wife Toshiko live alone. The Yokoyama family spends a casual time together, but this day happens to be the anniversary of the death of their eldest son, Junpei, who passed away 15 years ago.
t25050.tmdb_overview_en: A family gathers together for a commemorative ritual whose nature only gradually becomes clear.
t25050.tmdb_overview_jp: 夏の終わりのある日、横山良多は、再婚した妻のゆかりと、彼女の連れ子を伴って、久々に実家を訪問する。この日は、良多の亡き兄の15周忌だった。開業医だった父・恭平は、跡継ぎにと期待を寄せていた兄を不慮の事故で失ったショックから今なお立ち直れずにいて、目下失業中の良多との対話は、何かと衝突してぎくしゃくしがち。一方、やはり自分の家族を連れて帰省した姉のちなみは、努めて明るく振る舞う。
